name: Lendlease Group
analysis: LLC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 49% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$2.9200, stop A$2.3760, target A$3.3700 (0.83:1) — then trail it.
